summary: Geometry filter PARTIALLY resolved prior failures. S3 product collapse fixed (100%→25%), S2 band violation fixed, fragmentation caught (50-60%). BUT: S4 remains 100% defective (all physisorbed), S1/S3/S3b PES flat (3-27 meV top-10), MLIP energy ranking inverted across all surfaces. Proceed to DFT for S1,S2,S3(rank1-3),S3b with GEOMETRY-based selection. STOP S4.
concerns: S4 REJECT: 100% of shortlist have CO or CH3O physisorption. 884 C-H breaks suggest CH3O unstable on PdO2 under MACE. Cannot send to DFT.
S1/S3/S3b PES FLAT: top-10 within 3-27 meV (noise floor). MLIP energy ranking meaningless. Must select DFT candidates by GEOMETRY diversity only.
S3 rank-0 has MeO physisorbed (Pd-O=3.226 Å) yet 3038 meV ABOVE viable candidates. Energy ranking inverted.
NO surface has rank-0 = lowest energy. Distance-bin selection sacrifices energy ordering — acceptable for flat PES (S1/S3b), questionable for S2.
S4 represents 11% C-H break rate during relaxation — strong indicator that PdO2(110) fundamentally incompatible with this reactive-pair setup.
asks: S4 alternative: (a) skip S4 SetA, (b) try CHGNet/M3GNet MLIP, or (c) hand-place pairs + DFT-only
Re-filter S3 shortlist: drop rank-0 (Pd-O > 2.3 Å), promote chemisorbed candidate from unique pool
For S1/S3/S3b: explicitly document that shortlist selected by GEOMETRY diversity, not energy rank
Visual validation: render S2 rank-2,3 and all S4 to confirm Pd-C=3.4-3.7 Å is physisorption vs bridge-to-different-layer
Add chemisorption filter (Pd-C < 2.5 Å AND Pd-O < 2.3 Å) as hard requirement for shortlist selection in future runs

S1_Pd100.action: Send all 3 to DFT (ignore energies, maximize diversity)

S3_PdO100.action: Send rank-1,2,3 ONLY. DROP rank-0 (MeO physisorbed)

S4_PdO2_110.action: STOP. Do not send to DFT. Requires alternative approach.

resolved: S2 SetA band violation (was rank-0 at 1.9 Å, now all in [2.1,4.0))
not_resolved: PES flatness (was <0.5 meV, now 3-27 meV for S1/S3/S3b, still below 50 meV threshold)
Energy ranking inversion (rank-0 not lowest-E on any surface)
new_issues: S3 rank-0 MeO physisorbed (different defect than before)
S1 rank-1 CO physisorbed (not mentioned in prior)

recommendation:
CONDITIONAL GO with manual curation:
- S1, S2, S3 (rank 1-3 only), S3b → DFT Level 1 (vacuum opt)
- Select by GEOMETRIC diversity, not MLIP energy rank
- S4 → STOP, requires alternative strategy
- Geometry filter successfully removed catastrophic failures but cannot fix MLIP weak oxide binding and flat PES
- Phase 2 MLIP = STRUCTURE GENERATOR, not energy ranker
